prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐；吉林省2026年高考总报名约110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，物理类考生约7.99万人，较2025年8.04万人略降约0.5%，竞争压力略有缓和；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，非吉林省本地高校，无特殊地域偏好；该校在吉林省招生规模较小（约50人），对本省考生吸引力主要来自学校层次与区位优势。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group fluctuated significantly: 7638 → 10579 → 8527 → 11666 → 5137. In 2024, the ranking dropped sharply to 11666, but rebounded sharply to 5137 in 2025, showing a V-shaped trend in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5137. The enrollment plan for the science group in Jilin Province from 2021 to 2026 is 50, 50, 49, 49, 50, 50 respectively. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 46th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science (2026), with a stable ranking in the 40–46 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (improvement in cafeteria services), while in 2026, it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th overall (relatively hot), and it was ranked 5th in 2022 (very hot), with attention declining in recent years. No significant admission gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has two A- or above disciplines: Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-). Disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering and Chemistry are relatively strong, which are highly relevant to the university's science group admission majors (e.g., nanomaterials, clinical medicine, computer science, electronic information).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine remain highly recommended. The total number of Jilin Province Gaokao registrants in 2026 is approximately 110,868. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 79,900, a slight decrease of about 0.5% from 80,400 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Jilin Province, with no special regional preference. Its enrollment scale in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 50 students), and its appeal to local candidates mainly comes from its university level and geographical advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high base of the abnormal rebound to 5137 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the slight decrease in the number of physics category candidates in Jilin Province, and the slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025 (competition slightly cools down). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5337, with a range of 4837–5837.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4837), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>5837), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options.
